name: Mobocratic Union
short_description: Welcome to Mobocratic Union, a thrilling political simulation game where you'll navigate the politics of the European Union. Make strategic decisions, form alliances, and shape the course of the continent’s future!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the European Parliament! Strategize and guide your organization to power while navigating unpredictable narratives shaped by your decisions. With no scripted outcomes, each game offers a fresh experience filled with unique characters and thrilling political maneuvering.

IT’S ORIGINAL, BABY!

Mobocratic Union strives to be the ultimate political simulation game. Building on the mechanics of its predecessor, Mobocratic, MU embraces true unpredictability. Just like in real-world politics, there are no scripted storylines – the narrative evolves organically. By simulating characters' values, relationships, and various organizations, the game gives you an immersive experience. Each playthrough is a fresh experience, as a multitude of unique characters are generated every time you start a new game.

THE ART OF BEING A MOBOCRAT

Take charge and lead your organization to greatness! Become the ultimate powerhouse within the European Parliament by establishing influential networks, dominating your opponents, and cementing your reputation. Select your country, choose a name and avatar, and join a European Parliament Group.

Assemble a dedicated team, strategically assign tasks, engage with captivating characters, and actively contribute to the parliament's plenary sessions and committees. Immerse yourself in the exhilarating realm of political maneuvering and assert your authority!

MOD LIKE NEVER BEFORE!

Mobocratic Union is a highly customizable and mod-friendly political simulation game. You have the power to shape policies, redefine values, personalize names and avatars, create custom maps, and other possibilities. User generated content so far includes a community amendment pack and custom maps. Join our Discord community and share your creations with other players.

WORK IN PROGRESS

Mobocratic is a dynamic political simulation game where progress is the key. We understand that greatness doesn't happen overnight, which is why we are constantly evolving to provide the best experience possible. Our dedicated team of two developers is constantly developing new and exciting features, while also improving the existing ones. Our goal is to craft a game that not only captivates you but one that we would love to play ourselves. Get ready to embark on an immersive journey where your decisions shape the political landscape. Let the adventure begin!
